title: PvP Optimized
description: This mod pack is designed for players seeking optimal FPS performance and all the necessary mods for PvP.
body: **Pvp Optimized** is the ideal choice for PvP enthusiasts seeking top performance and versatility. This modpack integrates the best PvP mods, FPS-enhancing features, content creation tools, and building mods into one package. Engineered for maximum performance, it delivers up to 3x the FPS of vanilla Minecraft. Whether you're engaged in combat, creating content, or constructing your dream base, this modpack meets all your needs. Experience the perfect blend of power and efficiency!
